title: Completed Local Docs Management Migration
summary: Completed the Docs Viewer manage-mode migration to the local Studio app server for ordinary source/edit/import/scope workflows and retired the standalone Docs management HTTP process from default dev startup.
effect: Local /docs/ manage mode now uses the Python Studio app server for staged import, drag/drop move, scope create/delete, and the previously migrated create/edit/settings/archive/delete workflows. Docs capabilities now enumerate live configured scopes so user-created scopes can be deleted without restarting into the old static scope map. bin/dev-studio leaves the old docs-management server disabled unless DOCS_MANAGEMENT_SERVER_ENABLED=1 is explicitly set.
verification: Python compile checks passed for scripts/docs/docs_management_server.py and local Docs management smoke tests
tests/smoke/local_studio_docs_management_workflows.py passed against a temporary fixture repo
tests/smoke/local_studio_docs_management_ui.py passed against a temporary fixture repo
